welcome:
Welcome to the Loan/Mortgage Calculator!
All you need to do is have your loan amount, length of your loan, and the APR!
Lets gets started!
amount_wel: Let's start with your loan amount. You can type it with or without commas! (100,000 or 100000)
amount_num: Remeber to only enter numbers. These are numbers
amount_zero: You cannot enter a loan amount of $0, lets try this again
apr_input:
Enter your APR as a percentage.
For example you can enter 6.5%, 7, or 4%:
apr_float:
What you entered wasn't really a number.
Try again but this time pay attention to the examples!
len_year:
Enter your loan duration in years.
Don't worry about entering additional months right now, you'll get a chance to enter those later!
len_num:
Yeah that wasn't really a number.
 It's ok! This time enter the length of your loan in years! (like 15 or 25)
